description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a wooden fence. The front yard features a paved driveway leading to a garage, with three trees and a well-maintained lawn. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a wooden deck, a swimming pool, and a small covered patio area. Large windows are distributed across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray color, and the property is bordered by a wooden privacy fence. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a front driveway, and a backyard featuring a pool and deck, all enclosed by a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, three trees, and a manicured lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the transition to the backyard with the pool and deck visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, swimming pool, backyard lawn, and large rear windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, pool, deck, and a partial view of the driveway and front yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small overhang, and a paved path leading from the driveway, flanked by landscaping.
